jp.title: 地球の核に眠る｢金｣がマントルに流れ出している
jp.description: 2025年5月29日の記事を編集して再掲載しています。金鉱床が火山活動と関係しているのは知ってたけれど…。どうやら地球の中心部は、私たちが思っていたよりもちょっと漏れやすいようです。Natureに掲載された研究によると、地球の奥深くにある金属でできた核から、ルテニウムや金といった貴重な金属が、地表の火山岩にまで漏れ出している証拠が見つかったそうです。火山の溶岩から核

jp.title: AMD新CPU「Ryzen 9 9950X3D2」グローバルでレビューおよび発売解禁―ゲーミングもマルチスレッド性能も良好だが…
jp.description: 両コア3D V-Cache搭載により、マルチスレッド性能は最高峰ですが、ゲーミングでは従来モデルとほぼ同等、価格は割高という課題を抱えています。

jp.title: ASCII.jp：Ryzen 9 9950X3D2最速レビュー【後編】 デュアル3D V
jp.description: ターゲットをゲーマーから開発者に変更した「Ryzen 9 9950X3D2 Dual Edition」。筆者は幸運なことに、レビューサンプルに触れる機会に恵まれた。本稿はその後編。ゲームでの性能を検証する。

world.title: Warriors coach Mufutu hails his side’s weekend win, game quality
world.description: Ulinzi showed flashes of brilliance, particularly in a strong fourth-quarter display that helped seal the win.

world.title: ISIS recruiter Ashton Larmond released after two-thirds of sentence
world.description: Parole board has attached special conditions on his release including monitoring of his phone use and finances.

world.title: Vitamin A deficiency can cost children their eyesight. Zimbabwe is on the march to roll back that risk
world.description: One in four Zimbabwean children is deficient in Vitamin A, which means they are at risk of stunting and vision loss. The immunisation system is working on changing that.

world.title: In Uganda, TB survivors are boosting childhood vaccination in the hardest-to-reach communities
world.description: Former tuberculosis patients in Uganda are going door to door in communities with low vaccination rates, and turning their own stories into a force for change.

world.title: Africa’s malaria fight needs stronger local research
world.description: As progress on malaria stalls, the case for local research in Africa is stronger than ever as key indicators are beginning to stall.

world.title: Demand For Vacations In Bali’s Sanur Soars As Tourists Enjoy Resort’s Massive Upgrades
world.description: Sanur has always had a loyal community of visitors, some of whom have returned multiple times a year for more than a decade.

world.title: The Dry's Siobhán Cullen is the new mum in season three
world.description: The Dry star Siobhán Cullen has told RTÉ Entertainment that fans of the comedy-drama will see a surprising side to her character, the acerbic Caroline, in the third and final season on RTÉ One and RTÉ Player.

world.title: Court remands suspected coup plotters in DSS custody
world.description: Six suspected coup plotters have been remanded in DSS custody by a Federal High Court in Abuja after pleading not guilty to a 13-count terrorism charge.

world.title: Ghana introduces a National Workplace HIV and Wellness Policy
world.description: Ghana has launched a new National Workplace HIV and Wellness Policy aimed at promoting healthier and stigma-free working environments across the country.

world.title: NPA bill to introduce major reforms in petroleum pricing structure
world.description: A new National Petroleum Authority (NPA) Bill, yet to be laid before Parliament, is expected to introduce major reforms to petroleum pricing and funding structures, including the introduction of an $80 levy on every metric tonne of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG) to finance Ghana’s Cylinder Recirculation Model. NPA Chief Executive Officer Edudzi Tamakloe disclosed the proposals while outlining ongoing stakeholder consultations on the draft legislation, which he described as part of efforts to streamline petroleum levies and improve efficiency in the downstream sector.
